_comment: Action Cards de TI4 (Base + Codex I + Prophecy of Kings). Texto verbatim tomado de Twilight Imperium Wiki (twilight-imperium.fandom.com/wiki/Action_Cards), que reproduce el texto oficial impreso en las cartas. 'count' = cantidad de copias en el mazo. 'timing' es el texto de encabezado que indica cuándo se puede jugar. Flavor text NO incluido (no es necesario para la lógica de juego).

actionCards.name: Ancient Burial Sites
actionCards.timing: At the start of the agenda phase:
actionCards.effect: Choose 1 player. Exhaust each cultural planet owned by that player.

actionCards.name: Assassinate Representative
actionCards.effect: Choose 1 player. That player cannot vote on this agenda.

actionCards.name: Bribery
actionCards.timing: After the speaker votes on an agenda:
actionCards.effect: Spend any number of trade goods. For each trade good spent, cast 1 additional vote for the outcome on which you voted.

actionCards.name: Bunker
actionCards.timing: At the start of an invasion:
actionCards.effect: During this invasion, apply -4 to the result of each Bombardment roll against planets you control.

actionCards.name: Confusing Legal Text
actionCards.timing: When you are elected as the outcome of an agenda:
actionCards.effect: Choose 1 player. That player is the elected player instead.

actionCards.name: Construction Rider
actionCards.effect: You cannot vote on this agenda. Predict aloud an outcome of this agenda. If your prediction is correct, place 1 space dock from your reinforcements on a planet you control.

actionCards.name: Courageous to the End
actionCards.timing: After 1 of your ships is destroyed during a space combat:
actionCards.effect: Roll 2 dice. For each result equal to or greater than that ship's combat value, your opponent must choose and destroy 1 of their ships.

actionCards.name: Cripple Defenses
actionCards.effect: Destroy each PDS on that planet.

actionCards.name: Diplomacy Rider
actionCards.effect: You cannot vote on this agenda. Predict aloud an outcome of this agenda. If your prediction is correct, choose 1 system that contains a planet you control. Each other player places a command token from their reinforcements in that system.

actionCards.name: Direct Hit
actionCards.timing: After another player's ship uses Sustain Damage to cancel a hit produced by your units or abilities:
actionCards.effect: Destroy that ship.

actionCards.name: Disable
actionCards.timing: At the start of an invasion in a system that contains 1 or more of your opponents' PDS units:
actionCards.effect: Your opponents' PDS units lose Planetary Shield and Space Cannon during this invasion.

actionCards.name: Distinguished Councilor
actionCards.timing: After you cast votes on an outcome of an agenda:
actionCards.effect: Cast 5 additional votes for that outcome.

actionCards.name: Economic Initiative
actionCards.effect: Ready each cultural planet you control.

actionCards.name: Emergency Repairs
actionCards.timing: At the start or end of a combat round:
actionCards.effect: Repair all of your units that have Sustain Damage in the active system.

actionCards.name: Experimental Battlestation
actionCards.timing: After another player moves ships into a system during a tactical action:
actionCards.effect: Choose 1 of your space docks that is either in or adjacent to that system. That space dock uses Space Cannon 5 (x3) against ships in the active system.

actionCards.name: Fighter Prototype
actionCards.timing: At the start of the first round of a space combat:
actionCards.effect: Apply +2 to the result of each of your fighters' combat rolls during this combat round.

actionCards.name: Fire Team
actionCards.timing: After your ground forces make combat rolls during a round of ground combat:
actionCards.effect: Reroll any number of your dice.

actionCards.name: Flank Speed
actionCards.effect: Apply +1 to the move value of each of your ships during this tactical action.

actionCards.name: Focused Research
actionCards.effect: Spend 4 trade goods to research 1 technology.

actionCards.name: Frontline Deployment
actionCards.effect: Place 3 infantry from your reinforcements on 1 planet you control.

actionCards.name: Ghost Ship
actionCards.effect: Place 1 destroyer from your reinforcements in a non-home system that contains a wormhole and does not contain other players' ships.

actionCards.name: Imperial Rider
actionCards.effect: You cannot vote on this agenda. Predict aloud an outcome of this agenda. If your prediction is correct, gain 1 victory point.

actionCards.name: In The Silence Of Space
actionCards.effect: Choose 1 system. During this tactical action, your ships in the chosen system can move through systems that contain other players' ships.

actionCards.name: Industrial Initiative
actionCards.effect: Gain 1 trade good for each industrial planet you control.

actionCards.name: Infiltrate
actionCards.timing: When you gain control of a planet:
actionCards.effect: Replace each PDS and space dock that is on that planet with a matching unit from your reinforcements.

actionCards.name: Insubordination
actionCards.effect: Remove 1 token from another player's tactic pool and return it to their reinforcements.

actionCards.name: Intercept
actionCards.timing: After your opponent declares a retreat during a space combat:
actionCards.effect: Your opponent cannot retreat during this round of space combat.

actionCards.name: Leadership Rider
actionCards.effect: You cannot vote on this agenda. Predict aloud an outcome of this agenda. If your prediction is correct, gain 3 command tokens.

actionCards.name: Lost Star Chart
actionCards.effect: During this tactical action, systems that contain alpha and beta wormholes are adjacent to each other.

actionCards.name: Lucky Shot
actionCards.effect: Destroy 1 dreadnought, cruiser, or destroyer in a system that contains a planet you control.

actionCards.name: Maneuvering Jets
actionCards.timing: Before you assign hits produced by another player's Space Cannon roll:
actionCards.effect: Cancel 1 hit.

actionCards.name: Mining Initiative
actionCards.effect: Gain trade goods equal to the resource value of 1 planet you control.

actionCards.name: Morale Boost
actionCards.timing: At the start of a combat round:
actionCards.effect: Apply +1 to the result of each of your unit's combat rolls during this combat round.

actionCards.name: Parley
actionCards.timing: After another player commits units to land on a planet you control:
actionCards.effect: Return the committed units to the space area.

actionCards.name: Plague
actionCards.timing: Action: Choose 1 planet that is controlled by another player.
actionCards.effect: Roll 1 die for each infantry on that planet. For each result of 6 or greater, destroy 1 of those units.

actionCards.name: Political Stability
actionCards.timing: When you would return your strategy card(s) during the status phase:
actionCards.effect: Do not return your strategy card(s). You do not choose strategy cards during the next strategy phase.

actionCards.name: Politics Rider
actionCards.effect: You cannot vote on this agenda. Predict aloud an outcome of this agenda. If your prediction is correct, draw 3 action cards and gain the speaker token.

actionCards.name: Public Disgrace
actionCards.timing: When another player chooses a strategy card during the strategy phase:
actionCards.effect: That player must choose a different strategy card instead, if able.

actionCards.name: Reactor Meltdown
actionCards.effect: Destroy 1 space dock in a non-home system.

actionCards.name: Reparations
actionCards.timing: After another player gains control of a planet you control:
actionCards.effect: Exhaust 1 planet that player controls and ready 1 planet you control.

actionCards.name: Repeal Law
actionCards.effect: Discard 1 law from play.

actionCards.name: Rise of a Messiah
actionCards.effect: Place 1 infantry from your reinforcements on each planet you control.

actionCards.name: Sabotage
actionCards.timing: When another player plays an action card other than "Sabotage":
actionCards.effect: Cancel that action card.

actionCards.name: Salvage
actionCards.timing: After you win a space combat:
actionCards.effect: Your opponent gives you all of their commodities.

actionCards.name: Shields Holding
actionCards.timing: Before you assign hits to your ships during a space combat:
actionCards.effect: Cancel up to 2 hits.

actionCards.name: Signal Jamming
actionCards.effect: Choose 1 non-home system that contains or is adjacent to 1 of your ships. Place a command token from another player's reinforcements in that system.

actionCards.name: Skilled Retreat
actionCards.timing: At the start of a combat round:
actionCards.effect: Move all of your ships from the active system into an adjacent system that does not contain another player's ships; the space combat ends in a draw. Then, place a command token from your reinforcements in that system.
actionCards.notes: FAQ: solo puede jugarse al inicio de una ronda de combate ESPACIAL, no terrestre.

actionCards.name: Spy
actionCards.effect: Choose 1 player. That player gives you 1 random action card from their hand.

actionCards.name: Summit
actionCards.timing: At the start of the strategy phase:
actionCards.effect: Gain 2 command tokens.

actionCards.name: Tactical Bombardment
actionCards.effect: Choose 1 system that contains 1 or more of your units that have Bombardment. Exhaust each planet controlled by other players in that system.

actionCards.name: Technology Rider
actionCards.effect: You cannot vote on this agenda. Predict aloud an outcome of this agenda. If your prediction is correct, research 1 technology.

actionCards.name: Trade Rider
actionCards.effect: You cannot vote on this agenda. Predict aloud an outcome of this agenda. If your prediction is correct, gain 5 trade goods.

actionCards.name: Unexpected Action
actionCards.effect: Remove 1 of your command tokens from the game board and return it to your reinforcements.

actionCards.name: Unstable Planet
actionCards.effect: Choose 1 hazardous planet. Exhaust that planet and destroy up to 3 infantry on it.

actionCards.name: Upgrade
actionCards.timing: After you activate a system that contains 1 or more of your ships:
actionCards.effect: Replace one of your cruisers in that system with one of your dreadnoughts from your reinforcements.

actionCards.name: Uprising
actionCards.effect: Exhaust 1 non-home planet controlled by another player. Then gain trade goods equal to its resource value.

actionCards.name: Veto
actionCards.effect: Discard that agenda and reveal 1 agenda from the top of the deck. Players vote on this agenda instead.

actionCards.name: War Effort
actionCards.effect: Place 1 cruiser from your reinforcements in a system that contains 1 or more of your ships.

actionCards.name: Warfare Rider
actionCards.effect: You cannot vote on this agenda. Predict aloud an outcome of this agenda. If your prediction is correct, place 1 dreadnought from your reinforcements in a system that contains 1 or more of your ships.

actionCards.name: Blitz
actionCards.timing: At the start of an invasion:
actionCards.effect: Each of your non-fighter ships in the active system that do not have BOMBARDMENT gain BOMBARDMENT 6 until the end of the invasion.

actionCards.name: Counterstroke
actionCards.timing: After a player activates a system that contains 1 of your command tokens:
actionCards.effect: Return that command token to your tactic pool.

actionCards.name: Fighter Conscription
actionCards.effect: Place 1 fighter from your reinforcements in each system that contains 1 or more of your space docks or units that have capacity; they cannot be placed in systems that contain other players' ships.

actionCards.name: Forward Supply Base
actionCards.timing: After another player activates a system that contains your units:
actionCards.effect: Gain 3 trade goods. Then, choose another player to gain 1 trade good.

actionCards.name: Ghost Squad
actionCards.timing: After a player commits units to land on a planet you control:
actionCards.effect: Move any number of ground forces from any planet you control in the active system to any other planet you control in the active system.

actionCards.name: Hack Election
actionCards.effect: During this agenda, voting begins with the player to the right of the speaker and continues counterclockwise.

actionCards.name: Harness Energy
actionCards.effect: Replenish your commodities.

actionCards.name: Impersonation
actionCards.effect: Spend 3 influence to draw 1 secret objective.

actionCards.name: Insider Information
actionCards.effect: Look at the top card of the agenda deck.

actionCards.name: Master Plan
actionCards.effect: You may perform an additional action this turn.

actionCards.name: Plagiarize
actionCards.effect: Spend 5 influence and choose a non-faction technology owned by 1 of your neighbors; gain that technology.

actionCards.name: Rally
actionCards.timing: After you activate a system that contains another player's ships:
actionCards.effect: Place 2 command tokens from your reinforcements in your fleet pool.

actionCards.name: Reflective Shielding
actionCards.timing: When one of your ships uses SUSTAIN DAMAGE during combat:
actionCards.effect: Produce 2 hits against your opponent's ships in the active system.

actionCards.name: Sanction
actionCards.effect: You cannot vote on this agenda. Predict aloud an outcome of this agenda. If your prediction is correct, each player that voted for that outcome returns 1 command token from their fleet supply to their reinforcements.

actionCards.name: Scramble Frequency
actionCards.timing: After another player makes a BOMBARDMENT, SPACE CANNON, or ANTI-FIGHTER BARRAGE roll:
actionCards.effect: That player rerolls all of their dice.

actionCards.name: Solar Flare
actionCards.effect: During this movement, other players cannot use SPACE CANNON against your ships.

actionCards.name: War Machine
actionCards.timing: When 1 or more of your units use PRODUCTION:
actionCards.effect: Apply +4 to the total PRODUCTION value of your units and reduce the combined cost of the produced units by 1.

actionCards.name: Archaeological Expedition
actionCards.effect: Reveal the top 3 cards of an exploration deck that matches a planet you control; gain any relic fragments that you reveal and discard the rest.

actionCards.name: Confounding Legal Text
actionCards.timing: When another player is elected as the outcome of an agenda:
actionCards.effect: You are the elected player instead.

actionCards.name: Coup d'Etat
actionCards.timing: When another player would perform a strategic action:
actionCards.effect: End that player's turn; the strategic action is not resolved and the strategy card is not exhausted.

actionCards.name: Deadly Plot
actionCards.timing: During the agenda phase, when an outcome would be resolved:
actionCards.effect: If you voted for or predicted another outcome, discard the agenda instead; the agenda is resolved with no effect and it is not replaced. Then, exhaust all of your planets.

actionCards.name: Decoy Operation
actionCards.timing: After another player activates a system that contains 1 or more of your structures:
actionCards.effect: Remove up to 2 of your ground forces from the game board and place them on a planet you control in the active system.

actionCards.name: Diplomatic Pressure
actionCards.effect: Choose another player; that player must give you 1 promissory note from their hand.

actionCards.name: Divert Funding
actionCards.effect: Return a non-unit upgrade, non-faction technology that you own to your technology deck. Then, research another technology.

actionCards.name: Exploration Probe
actionCards.effect: Explore a frontier token that is in or adjacent to a system that contains 1 or more of your ships.

actionCards.name: Manipulate Investments
actionCards.timing: At the start of the Strategy Phase:
actionCards.effect: Place a total of 5 trade goods from the supply on strategy cards of your choice; you must place these tokens on at least 3 different cards.

actionCards.name: Nav Suite
actionCards.effect: During the "Movement" step of this tactical action, ignore the effects of anomalies.

actionCards.name: Refit Troops
actionCards.effect: Choose 1 or 2 of your infantry on the game board; replace each of those infantry with mechs.

actionCards.name: Reveal Prototype
actionCards.timing: At the start of a combat:
actionCards.effect: Spend 4 resources to research a unit upgrade technology of the same type as 1 of your units that is participating in this combat.

actionCards.name: Reverse Engineer
actionCards.timing: When another player discards an action card that has a component action:
actionCards.effect: Take that action card from the discard pile.

actionCards.name: Rout
actionCards.timing: At the start of the "Announce Retreats" step of space combat, if you are the defender:
actionCards.effect: Your opponent must announce a retreat, if able.

actionCards.name: Scuttle
actionCards.effect: Choose 1 or 2 of your non-fighter ships on the game board and return them to your reinforcements; gain trade goods equal to the combined cost of those ships.

actionCards.name: Seize Artifact
actionCards.effect: Choose 1 of your neighbors that has 1 or more relic fragments. That player must give you 1 relic fragment of your choice.

actionCards.name: Waylay
actionCards.timing: Before you roll dice for Anti-Fighter Barrage:
actionCards.effect: Hits from this roll are produced against all ships (not just fighters).

_thundersEdge.name: Black Market Dealings
_thundersEdge.timing: When you are negotiating a transaction:
_thundersEdge.effect: You and the other player can include relics, action cards, and unscored secret objectives as part of the transaction. This card cannot be cancelled.

_thundersEdge.name: Brilliance
_thundersEdge.effect: Ready 1 of your planets that has a technology speciality or choose 1 player to gain their breakthrough.

_thundersEdge.name: Crash Landing
_thundersEdge.timing: When your last ship in the active system is destroyed:
_thundersEdge.effect: Place 1 of your ground forces from the space area of the active system onto a planet in that system other than Mecatol Rex; if the planet contains other players' units, place your ground force into coexistence.

_thundersEdge.name: Crisis
_thundersEdge.timing: At the end of any player's turn, if there are at least 2 players who have not passed:

_thundersEdge.name: Exchange Program
_thundersEdge.effect: Choose another player. You and the player may agree to place 1 infantry from each of your reinforcements into coexistence on a planet the other player controls that contains their ground forces; if no agreement is reached, you each discard 1 token from your fleet pool.

_thundersEdge.name: Extreme Duress
_thundersEdge.timing: At the start of another player's turn, if they have a readied strategy card:
_thundersEdge.effect: If that player's next action is not a strategic action, they discard all of their action cards, give you all of their trade goods, and show you all of their secret objectives.

_thundersEdge.name: Lie in Wait
_thundersEdge.timing: After 2 of your neighbours resolve a transaction:
_thundersEdge.effect: Look at each of those player's hands of action cards, then choose and take 1 action card from each.

_thundersEdge.name: Mercenary Contract
_thundersEdge.effect: Spend 2 trade goods to place 2 neutral infantry on any non-home planet that contains no units; if that planet was owned by another player, they return its planet card to the planet card deck.

_thundersEdge.name: Pirate Contract
_thundersEdge.effect: Place 1 neutral destroyer in a non-home system that contains no non-neutral ships.

_thundersEdge.name: Pirate Fleet
_thundersEdge.effect: Spend 3 resources to place 1 neutral carrier, 1 neutral cruiser, 1 neutral destroyer, and 2 neutral fighters in a non-home system that contains no non-neutral ships.

_thundersEdge.name: Puppets on a String
_thundersEdge.timing: At the end of any player's turn, if you have passed:

_thundersEdge.name: Rescue
_thundersEdge.timing: After another player moves ships into a system that contains your ships:
_thundersEdge.effect: You may move 1 of your ships into the active system from any system that does not contain one of your command tokens.

_thundersEdge.name: Strategize
_thundersEdge.effect: Perform the secondary ability of any readied or unchosen strategy card.

_thundersEdge.name: Overrule
_thundersEdge.effect: Perform the primary ability of any readied or unchosen strategy card.

_thundersEdgeUpdatedWording._comment: Thunder's Edge incluyó todas las cartas de los Codex, pero algunas recibieron actualizaciones de texto (marcadas con Ω en el nombre). Si se juega con Thunder's Edge, estas versiones reemplazan a las originales listadas arriba.

cards.name: Fighter Conscription Ω
cards.effect: Place 1 fighter from your reinforcements in each system that contains 1 or more of your space docks or ships that have a capacity value; they cannot be placed in systems that contain other players' ships.

cards.name: Blitz Ω
cards.timing: At the start of an invasion:
cards.effect: Each of your non-fighter ships in the active system that does not have BOMBARDMENT gains BOMBARDMENT 6 until the end of the invasion.

cards.name: Hack Election Ω
cards.effect: During this agenda, you vote last.

cards.name: Solar Flare Ω
cards.effect: During the "Movement" step of this tactical action, other players cannot use SPACE CANNON against your ships.

cards.name: Counterstroke Ω
cards.timing: After another player activates a system that contains 1 of your command tokens:
cards.effect: Return that command token to your tactic pool.

cards.name: Ghost Squad Ω
cards.timing: After another player commits units to land on a planet you control:
cards.effect: Move any number of ground forces from any planet you control in the active system to any other planet you control in the active system.

cards.name: War Machine Ω
cards.timing: When 1 or more of your units use PRODUCTION:
cards.effect: Apply +4 to the total PRODUCTION value of those units and reduce the combined cost of the produced units by 1.

_rulingsFAQ.question: ¿Se considera un retreat y puede ser cancelada por Intercept?
_rulingsFAQ.answer: No, Skilled Retreat no es un retreat y no puede ser cancelada de esa forma.

_rulingsFAQ.question: ¿Puede jugarse al inicio de un combate terrestre?
_rulingsFAQ.answer: No. Solo puede jugarse al inicio de una ronda de combate ESPACIAL.

_rulingsFAQ.question: ¿Puede usarse Sustain Damage contra esta carta?
_rulingsFAQ.answer: No, Courageous to the End no produce hits.

_rulingsFAQ.question: ¿Pueden ambos jugadores jugar Shields Holding en la misma ventana de timing?
_rulingsFAQ.answer: Sí, porque cada carta apunta a un set distinto de hits.

_rulingsFAQ.question: ¿Puede cancelar hits de habilidades como Ambush, Dimensional Splicer o Devotion?
¿Pueden jugarse dos Direct Hit el mismo jugador en la misma ronda contra distintos objetivos?
¿Puede jugarse cuando Sustain Damage cancela un hit producido por una habilidad (no por combate normal)?
_rulingsFAQ.answer: Sí, incluye hits de Ambush, Dimensional Splicer, Devotion y similares.

_rulingsFAQ.question: ¿Un efecto de 'votos adicionales' como Bribery abre la ventana para jugar esta carta?
_rulingsFAQ.answer: No, solo se puede jugar después de votar en el paso de Vote normal.

_rulingsFAQ.question: ¿En qué momento exacto se juega?
_rulingsFAQ.answer: Después de que se eligen los objetivos de la carta, pero antes de resolver efectos, votar, o tirar dados.

_rulingsFAQ.question: ¿Puede usarse contra las propias unidades/planetas?
_rulingsFAQ.answer: No, solo contra unidades/planetas de otros jugadores.

_rulingsFAQ.question: ¿Puede un jugador jugar varias rider cards en la misma agenda, incluso en distintos outcomes?
¿El cruiser ya debe estar en el sistema activo?
¿Puede usarse si no entran naves, o contra naves que no son del jugador activo?
_rulingsFAQ.answer: No a ambas; requiere que entren naves del jugador activo.

_rulingsFAQ.question: ¿Puede un jugador que no puede votar (ej. Nekro Virus) jugar rider cards?
¿Puede jugarse si el speaker no vota?
_rulingsFAQ.answer: Sí, igual se abre la ventana de timing.

_rulingsFAQ.question: ¿Pueden jugarse tras abstenerse de votar?
_rulingsFAQ.answer: No, abstenerse hace perder la capacidad de votar hasta la próxima agenda.

_rulingsFAQ.question: ¿Permite ignorar prerrequisitos de tecnología?
_rulingsFAQ.answer: No, 'research' siempre respeta prerrequisitos; solo 'gain' los ignora.

_rulingsFAQ.question: ¿Puede colocar un destructor en un sistema Asteroid/Alpha sin Antimass Deflectors?
_rulingsFAQ.answer: Sí, porque es colocación, no movimiento.

_pending: COMPLETO según las tablas de la wiki: 59 cartas Base Game + 17 Codex I + 17 Prophecy of Kings (incluye Waylay) = 93 cartas en el array principal 'actionCards'. NOTA IMPORTANTE: el texto descriptivo de la wiki menciona 'Codex I introduced 20 new Action Cards' y 'bringing the total up to 120' (PoK), pero las TABLAS reales solo listan 17 cartas para cada expansión — se cargó lo que aparece efectivamente en la tabla (fuente de datos), no la cifra narrativa del texto, para no inventar cartas no vistas. Esta discrepancia queda señalada para verificar contra el mazo físico si es posible. Las 14 cartas de Thunder's Edge están en '_thundersEdge' (separadas, expansion=3, no integradas al array principal por ahora ya que el proyecto trabaja Base+PoK). Actualizaciones de wording 'Ω' en '_thundersEdgeUpdatedWording'. El mazo de 'Twilight's Fall Variant' (modo alternativo) no fue cargado. Rulings oficiales del FAQ en '_rulingsFAQ'.
